final:
// // This is a 1-to-4 demultiplexer
module top_module(
  input in0,
  input in1,
  input in2,
  input in3,
  input sel0,
  input sel1,
  output out
);assign out = (sel1 & sel0) ? in3 :
               (sel1 & ~sel0) ? in2 :
               (~sel1 & sel0) ? in1 :
               in0;

endmodule
